title: DnT Stellarity Compat
description: Allows for  Dungeons and Taverns and Stellarity strongholds to generate simultaneously within a world and allows for custom weighting of each.
body:
Dungeons & Taverns-Stellarity Compat is a datapack that allows for strongholds from each datapack to generate simultaneously within the world. Each stronghold type has an equal likelihood of generating.

Links to the original content from each creator can be found below:

[Dungeon and Taverns Stronghold Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns-stronghold-overhaul)

[Stellarity](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stellarity)
